title: Epic ACG(EFM ACG PACK)
body:
# **国人游玩须知**
## **拉刀光掉帧是你的问题，升级电脑配置，不然就别玩，没人求你**
## **手机玩产生的问题一律不理，别来烦劳资**
## **死亡粒子开关看下面的指令，以后再问怎么关我就把开关删了。**
## **冈易小鬼去亖**

# Please use Github Issues to bug report and pasete your game log file
# bug反馈请使用github issues功能，并附上你的游戏日志文件

This mod will remain unfinished for a long time.

This means that it may have many bugs.

And I didn't test the multiplayer game environment, especially the LAN mode.

# Mod Content
This Mod adds some ACG contents to EpicFight.


## Features(available now):
Bow combo style(Auto lock on, Fall attack, Special attack) based on Yoimiya(character in Genshin Impact)
weapon type: genshin_bow


Scythe combo style
weapon type: battle_scythe


Some SAO's Weapon & Item & Skill
weapon type: sao_single_sword 


new swing trail particle type: epicacg:bloom_type
compat with oculus pipeline.


## Removed Features(wait to rebuild):
SAO style HealthBar(customizable to a certain extent)
HB adjusting please refer default config file.(EpicAddonHealthBar.json)

## Commands
/epicaddon Reload ----reload config

/epicaddon DeathParthcle <boolean>  ----enable/disable death particle

## Wiki (Config & Datapack support) now death
https://github.com/dfdyz/EpicAddon/wiki/Config

# Notice
Mod on 1.16.5 no longer update.
